title: Resolution Approving and Adopting the Municipal School Board Resolution No. 2023-01 Dated January 11, 2023 Entitled: Resolution Approving the Payment of 2022 Instructional Material Support to Three (3) Philippine High School for the Arts Teachers at Three Thousand Pesos Each Totaling to Nine Thousand Pesos (P 9,000.00) and Further Requesting Authority From the Honorable Sangguniang Bayan of Los Baños to Pay the Prior Year Expenditure Chargeable Against the Current Appropriation for the Same Ex
